prompt_text:
### Demographics: 71-year-old Asian man

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 11 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after preoperative labs showed elevated HbA1c
Current symptoms: No DKA/HHS symptoms; no recent hypoglycemia episodes; no acute complaints

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 5 (0-15) (Dialysis: Hemodialysis)
Heart failure: HFrEF (NYHA Class III)
MASH
Body mass index category: Overweight
Osteoporosis (on bisphosphonate therapy)
Recurrent Complicated Urinary Tract Infections
Psychotic Disorder on Atypical Antipsychotics
Major Depressive Disorder
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 5 (0-15) (Dialysis: Hemodialysis); HF: HFrEF (NYHA Class III); ASCVD (No); MASLD: MASH; BMI Category: Overweight
- Family history: Type 2 diabetes (younger sister)
- Social history: Current smoker (10 cigarettes/day for 20 years; ~10 pack-years); Alcohol 1-2 drinks/week

### Medication information
- Current medications: Linagliptin 5mg once daily; Quetiapine (150 mg nightly), Sertraline (50 mg daily), Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Losartan (50 mg daily), Ciprofloxacin (500 mg twice daily for 7 days), Alendronate (70 mg weekly), Calcium Carbonate 500 Mg + Cholecalciferol 1000 Iu (daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 79.7 kg; Height 180.4 cm; BMI 24.5 kg/m²; Blood pressure 124/77 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 10.3%; 9 months ago 9.9%; 6 months ago 9.4%; 3 months ago 8.9%; current 8.0%), FPG (12 months ago 250mg/dL; 9 months ago 283mg/dL; 6 months ago 201mg/dL; 3 months ago 188mg/dL; current 196mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 79.2kg; 9 months ago 78.8kg; 6 months ago 80.9kg; 3 months ago 81.7kg; current 79.7kg), Height (12 months ago 180.4cm; 9 months ago 180.4cm; 6 months ago 180.4cm; 3 months ago 180.4cm; current 180.4cm), BMI (12 months ago 24.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 24.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 25.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 25.0kg/m²; current 24.5kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 125mmHg; 9 months ago 122mmHg; 6 months ago 125mmHg; 3 months ago 122mmHg; current 124mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 80mmHg; 9 months ago 79mmHg; 6 months ago 78mmHg; 3 months ago 78mmHg; current 77mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 53U/L; 9 months ago 59U/L; 6 months ago 53U/L; 3 months ago 60U/L; current 55U/L), AST (12 months ago 85U/L; 9 months ago 84U/L; 6 months ago 84U/L; 3 months ago 78U/L; current 79U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 0.8mg/dL; 9 months ago 0.8mg/dL; 6 months ago 0.7mg/dL; 3 months ago 0.7mg/dL; current 0.7mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 16mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 12mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 11mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 11mL/min/1.73m²; current 9mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 257mg/g; 9 months ago 288mg/g; 6 months ago 216mg/g; 3 months ago 239mg/g; current 317mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 96mg/dL; 9 months ago 103mg/dL; 6 months ago 96mg/dL; 3 months ago 96mg/dL; current 99mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 39mg/dL; 9 months ago 43mg/dL; 6 months ago 43mg/dL; 3 months ago 40mg/dL; current 41mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 99mg/dL; 9 months ago 97mg/dL; 6 months ago 99mg/dL; 3 months ago 111mg/dL; current 105mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 11.0g/dL; 9 months ago 11.0g/dL; 6 months ago 10.2g/dL; 3 months ago 9.6g/dL; current 9.6g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Negative (Current); fasting C-peptide Not measured (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Moderate adherence (estimated 70-90%); SMBG 1-3 times/week; lifestyle control inconsistent.
Financial context: Patient has limited financial resources and prefers low-cost options (budget ≤ KRW 200,000/month).
